issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttacked' (opponent declares attack on this card), not 'OnAttack'
Missing duration 'DuringYourTurn' — text explicitly states '[Your Turn]'
Condition must check 'If a Character is rested by your effect' — currently 'Always' is insufficient. Needs custom condition or clarification that this activates only when Blocker ability resolves
Missing 'OncePerTurn' limiter stated in card text
Blocker ability text not represented in DSL at all. Card has two distinct mechanics: (1) Blocker passive, (2) Draw/Trash triggered effect
